ns0:entry.ns0:title: [autohotkey] ivelchampion249/FishSol-Macro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ivelchampion249/FishSol-Macro
Language: autohotkey
Works on 1920x1080, 2560x1440, and 1366x768. Must be on 100% zoom and Fullscreen. Firstly, you want to walk over to the Fisherman NPC (Captain Flarg), and open the sell menu and keep it open. After that, walk over to your favorite fishing spot. Press F1 to activate the macro, F2 to pause the macro, and F3 to force close.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] realskyrin/capcap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/realskyrin/capcap
Language: swift
A lightweight, native macOS screenshot tool that lives in your menu bar. Double-tap ⌘ Command to capture any region of your screen — instantly copied to clipboard, or annotate first with pen and mosaic tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] rooootdev/lara
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rooootdev/lara
Language: swift
iOS Toolbox using the DarkSword kexploit. iOS 17.0 - iOS 18.7.1 & iOS 26.0.x, excluding M5 and A19.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/cli-printing-press
Language: go
Every API has a secret identity. This finds it, absorbs every feature from every competing tool, then builds the GOAT CLI — designed for AI agents first, with SQLite sync, offline search, and compound insight commands.
